nasb.text: Therefore, behold, I will hedge up her way with thorns, And I will build a wall against her so that she cannot find her paths.

esv.text: Therefore I will hedge up her way with thorns, and I will build a wall against her, so that she cannot find her paths.

cnv.text: 因此，我要用荊棘堵塞她的通道， 我要築牆圍住她，使她找不著出路。

ccb.text: 因此，我要用荆棘围堵她， 筑墙阻断她的去路。
